agents.description: Primary pass. Reads the lease and pulls structured fields and clauses. Attorney-grade clause logic (V41.1/V45.1) covering 71-clause superset.
Deterministic pure-JS quality layer (V44.28). Checks missing critical fields, bad formats, structural problems. Feeds flags to Critic. No API call.
AI review pass (V45.0). Takes Validator flags, searches lease text to fix or fill flagged fields. Single cost-tracked call.
Post-extraction validation pass that auto-flags field quality. Uses fast, cheap model deliberately.
Attorney-grade clause-extraction mode — deeper legal-clause logic for renewal, holdover, co-tenancy, etc.

Supervisor/audit layer (V62). Always-visible panel watching every agent, auto-corrects what it safely can. Consolidated 7 earlier conflicting layers (V54-V61). Devil's Advocate mode stress-tests results.
